title: MCA-Nepal Annex D-1 Alignment Maps
note: 193-page A3 alignment atlas for the MCA central 400 kV corridor. Exact sheet ranges still need source-by-source confirmation.

title: World Bank Hetauda-Dhalkebar-Duhabi RAP
note: Best public route-map packet for HDDTL; includes overview map figure and detailed corridor description.

title: RPGCL Nepal Transmission Network Map Revised 2021
note: Official ArcMap geospatial PDF with extractable vector transmission linework and layer metadata. This is now the main extraction source for the four traced corridor outputs committed in the repo.

title: MCA-Nepal Project Summary Report
note: Useful for reconciling older Naubise-based nomenclature against the current Ratmate-centered MCA corridor naming.

title: MoEWRI IPSDP Executive Summary 2025
note: Useful for current and future interconnection framing, not detailed route tracing.

title: ADB SASEC Operational Plan 2016-2025 Update
note: Useful for corridor grouping and MCA project framing, not exact tracing.

title: JICA IPSDP Report Part 2
note: Good for corridor family grouping and planning context, not exact routing.

title: NEA Annual Report FY 2024/25
note: Best local source for current operational and under-construction line lists; not a route atlas.

title: NEA Transmission Annual Book 2077 (FY 2019/20)
note: Recovered from the live NEA dryicesolutions mirror on 2026-04-18. Useful for Solu corridor narrative evidence, especially the Tingla substation page and the Maruwa rerouting note.

title: NEA Bharatpur-Bardaghat 220 kV Transmission Line SIA
note: Official NEA SIA source identified during the HBB repair pass. The live NEA file endpoint rejected direct download in this environment, but the indexed text states the Bharatpur-Bardaghat alignment, affected VDC corridor, and 73.5 km route length.

title: NEA Marsyangdi Corridor RAP / route packet
note: Recovered from the live NEA dryicesolutions mirror on 2026-04-18. This is the main route-grade packet for Udipur-Markichowk-Bharatpur.

title: NEA Kabeli Corridor IEE
note: Recovered from Wayback on 2026-04-18 using the original NEA /images/supportive_docs path. This is now the primary route-grade source for the Kabeli corridor family.

title: NEA Kabeli Corridor SMEF
note: Recovered from Wayback on 2026-04-18. Useful for project description, location, substation references, and impact-area framing around the Kabeli line.

title: NEA Marsyangdi Corridor RAP (Manang-Khudi-Udipur)
note: Recovered from the live NEA dryicesolutions mirror on 2026-04-18. Companion route-grade source for the upper Marsyangdi section.

title: EIB Marsyangdi Corridor CIA
note: Companion source recovered on 2026-04-18. Useful for updated corridor context, cumulative impact framing, and segment lengths.
